data.title: Art Gathers in Beijing, Harmony Embraces All: 2026 Beijing Art Season to Open in May
data.description: This week in Beijing's 798 Art District, the details of the 2026 Beijing Art Season were revealed. Scheduled to take place from May 21 to June 15, the festival will showcase more than 400 events. Participants from around 20 countries will partake in this cultural extravaganza, highlighting the theme "Art...".

data.title: GMO GlobalSign Introduces TLS Connect, Bringing CLM Automation to Small and Medium Businesses
data.description: GMO GlobalSign, a worldwide Certificate Authority, has unveiled TLS Connect, a Certificate Lifecycle Management (CLM) solution tailored for small and medium enterprises (SMBs). This tool is aimed at automating the deployment and renewal of public trust TLS certificates, enabling SMBs to enhance security measures, adhere to regulatory standards, and mitigate business risks. The introduction of TLS Connect addresses a significant gap in the CLM sector, providing support for SMBs that depend on TLS certificates but face challenges with their management.

data.title: Suzu Labs Acquires Emulated Criminals to Expand Continuous Adversary Emulation Validation and AI-Driven Cybersecurity Capabilities
data.description: In Las Vegas, Suzu Labs, a cybersecurity and AI company, has acquired Emulated Criminals, a boutique firm specializing in adversary emulation and continuous red teaming. This acquisition enhances Suzu Labs' capacity to merge AI-driven security with ongoing human-led validation. This move allows for a shift from one-time compliance to offering a persistent testing partner for defense strategies. Specific terms of the acquisition were not disclosed.

data.title: Marketing Architects Adds Reach Index Optimization for Smarter TV Buying
data.description: Marketing Architects, a TV agency based in Minneapolis, has introduced a new media-buying feature known as Reach Index Optimization. This feature is designed to aid in optimizing for unique reach.

data.title: Marti Announces a New Share Repurchase Program
data.description: In Istanbul, Marti Technologies, Inc. (NYSE American: MRT), a prominent mobility super app in Türkiye, revealed a new share repurchase initiative. The Company's Board of Directors has given the green light to a program allowing the repurchase of up to $2.5 million worth of its Class A ordinary shares by October 26, 2026. This new Repurchase Program replaces the previously operational share repurchase program.

data.title: Domino's Pizza® Announces First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: Worldwide retail sales increased by 3.4% when factoring out the impact of foreign currency exchange rates. In the U.S., sales at stores open for at least a year grew by 0.9%. Conversely, international same-store sales dropped by 0.4% after eliminating the influence of foreign currency. The company experienced a net growth of 180 stores globally, with 19 new store openings in the U.S. and 161 additional stores worldwide.

data.title: Dole plc to Participate in Upcoming Investor Conferences
data.description: Dole plc (NYSE: DOLE) shared news about their participation in upcoming investor conferences. They will be taking part in the Goldman Sachs Global Staples Forum on May 12, 2026, with a fireside chat scheduled for 2.20pm ET. Following that, on May 13, 2026, they will be present at the BMO Global Farm to Market Conference. On June 2, 2026, Dole plc will participate in the TD Cowen Future of the Consumer Conference, with a fireside chat planned for 4.15pm ET. They will also be available for 1x1 investor meetings at each conference. To arrange a meeting with the management team, please...

data.title: Federal Court Issues Preliminary Injunction Against OpenAI, Sam Altman, and Sir Jony Ive; iyO Alleges Trade Secret Theft by Altman's Hardware Chief
data.description: In San Francisco on April 27, 2026, it was reported that on Thursday, April 23, 2026, the U.S. District Court for the Northern District of California issued a preliminary injunction in favor of iyO Inc. against OpenAI, Sam Altman, Sir Jony Ive, and io Products. The Court found in favor of iyO, citing reasons that were not disclosed, in the legal battle between the parties.
SDB shares buyback program: Week 17 transactions.

data.title: Direct Procurement Disruptions Costing Organizations $16 Million Annually
data.description: A recent research study conducted by Coupa revealed a growing disparity between top-performing and struggling companies within the direct procurement sector. The findings emphasize the critical importance of implementing artificial intelligence technology to update direct procurement practices. The report, titled State of Direct Spend 2026, published by Coupa, a major player in the industry, provides significant insights into this issue. This research was made public from Foster City, California, on April 27, 2026.

data.title: Pudu Robotics Inaugurates U.S. Headquarters in Dallas, Accelerating Long-Term Growth in the Americas
data.description: On April 23, 2026, Pudu Robotics, a prominent player in commercial service robots worldwide, inaugurated its latest U.S. base in Dallas, Texas. This move signifies a step towards its global expansion strategy. The new headquarters aims to bolster Pudu's operations in the region, marking a significant development for the company.

data.title: Quhuo Partners with Wons to Expand AI Data Collection and Training Services, Broadening International Reach
data.description: On April 27, 2026, in Beijing, Quhuo Limited (OTC: QHUOD, previously known as QHUOY) shared updates on a significant development. The Company revealed that its subsidiary, Beijing Quhuo Technology Co., Ltd., commonly referred to as the variable interest entity (VIE), has recently established a strategic cooperation framework.

data.title: Overview Energy and Meta Announce First-of-Its-Kind Agreement to Bring Space Solar Energy to Data Centers
data.description: In a groundbreaking agreement announced today in Ashburn, Virginia, Meta has emerged as a key player in a revolutionary energy infrastructure sector, thereby bolstering America's position as a leader in energy innovation. The partnership between Overview Energy and Meta marks a significant milestone in advancing American-produced energy. This unique collaboration sets the stage for future developments in the industry, signifying a major step forward in the nation's energy leadership.

data.title: AEA launches global Ammonia Certification System with MiQ to accelerate the adoption of clean ammonia
data.description: On April 27, 2026, the Ammonia Energy Association (AEA) announced a collaboration with MiQ to introduce the AEA Ammonia Certification System. This global certification system aims to streamline the secure global trade of low-emission ammonia. Through this partnership, the AEA seeks to enhance transparency and trust in international ammonia transactions.

data.title: Top Wall Street Forecasters Revamp Nucor Expectations Ahead Of Q1 Earnings
data.description: Nucor Corporation (NYSE: NUE) is set to announce its first-quarter earnings after market close on Monday, April 27. Analysts are predicting earnings of $2.82 per share for the Charlotte-based company, a significant increase from the previous year's 77 cents per share. Revenue estimates for the quarter stand at $8.86 billion, up from $7.83 billion reported last year. Nucor had initially projected GAAP EPS for the quarter to be between $2.70-$2.80 on March 19. On Friday, Nucor's shares closed at $214.29, showing a 0.6% increase. For further updates, Benzinga Pro offers access to the latest analyst ratings and insights on Nucor and other companies.

data.title: Western Union plans to introduce a Solana-based stablecoin and ‘Stable Card’ next month to replace SWIFT for settlements.
data.description: Next month, the USDPT stablecoin will be introduced as an alternative to SWIFT for agent settlements instead of consumer transactions. This new stablecoin aims to provide a secure and efficient option for these settlements. The USDPT stablecoin is expected to offer low transaction fees and fast processing times for agent settlements. This move marks a significant development in the digital currency sector and seeks to revolutionize the way agent settlements are conducted. The launch of USDPT is anticipated to bring about a shift in the industry, with a focus on enhancing efficiency and reducing costs.

data.title: Nova Polymers Unveils a Pure Exterior Substrate for the ADA Sign-Making Industry.
data.description: In Bryan, Ohio on April 27, 2026, Nova Polymers Inc. introduced the Novacryl® EX™ Series to meet the increasing need for durable and compliant signage in difficult environmental settings. This new exterior-grade photopolymer is designed to withstand challenging conditions and provides a solution for businesses and organizations seeking long-lasting signage.

data.title: Himel Looks to Empower Africa's Economy Through Sustainable Power and Better Living
data.description: In Hong Kong on April 27, 2026, it was reported that Africa's economic development is gaining speed due to fast urban growth, industrial advancement, and increasing need for dependable and eco-friendly energy sources. The current urban population in Africa stands at around 700 million people, and it is estimated to surge to 1.4 billion by the year 2050.
